headline: Auto Trader Group (LSE:AUTO) Stock Gets Fair Value Trim As Analysts Split On Valuation
summary: Auto Trader Group is back in focus after fresh work on valuation frameworks led some analysts to trim price targets, with cuts such as 816 GBp to 794 GBp and 515 GBp to 445 GBp now part of the discussion. These adjustments sit alongside Buy and Underweight ratings that reflect very different views on how much risk and reward is already reflected in current pricing. Read on to see how these shifting targets, and the research behind them, can help you track the evolving Autotrader Group story...
